title: Signed signals in an addition with out-of-bound index results in an exception
body:
Source:

> module top ( input clk );
>     reg signed ra [1];
>     reg signed rb [1];
>     always@(posedge clk)
>       rb [0] = ra [0] + ra [0][0];
> endmodule

Exception on line 656 from rtlif.cc ( check_expected function )
Commenting the check the result AST dump is:

> Successfully finished Verilog frontend.
> 
> yosys> dump
> 
> autoidx 12
> 
> attribute \src "exp.v:1"
> module \top
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   wire $add$exp.v:5$10_Y
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   wire $memrd$\ra$exp.v:5$9_DATA
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   wire $memrd$\ra$exp.v:5$8_DATA
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:4"
>   wire $0$memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_EN[0:0]$7
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:4"
>   wire $0$memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_DATA[0:0]$6
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:4"
>   wire width 32 $0$memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_ADDR[31:0]$5
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:4"
>   wire $0$mem2bits$\ra$exp.v:5$1[0:0]$4
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   wire $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_EN
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   wire $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_DATA
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   wire width 32 $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_ADDR
> 
>   attribute \nosync 1
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   wire $mem2bits$\ra$exp.v:5$1
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:1"
>   wire input 1 \clk
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:3"
>   memory size 1 offset 1 \rb
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:2"
>   memory size 1 offset 1 \ra
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   cell $memwr $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$11
>     parameter \PRIORITY 11
>     parameter \CLK_POLARITY 0
>     parameter \CLK_ENABLE 0
>     parameter \WIDTH 1
>     parameter \ABITS 32
>     parameter \MEMID "\\rb"
>     connect \EN $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_EN
>     connect \CLK 1'x
>     connect \DATA $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_DATA
>     connect \ADDR $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_ADDR
>   end
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   cell $add $add$exp.v:5$10
>     parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
>     parameter \B_WIDTH 1
>     parameter \A_WIDTH 1
>     parameter \B_SIGNED 0
>     parameter \A_SIGNED 1
>     connect \Y $add$exp.v:5$10_Y
>     connect \B $memrd$\ra$exp.v:5$8_DATA
>     connect \A $memrd$\ra$exp.v:5$9_DATA
>   end
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   cell $memrd $memrd$\ra$exp.v:5$9
>     parameter \TRANSPARENT 0
>     parameter \CLK_POLARITY 0
>     parameter \CLK_ENABLE 0
>     parameter \WIDTH 1
>     parameter \ABITS 32
>     parameter \MEMID "\\ra"
>     connect \DATA $memrd$\ra$exp.v:5$9_DATA
>     connect \ADDR 0
>     connect \EN 1'x
>     connect \CLK 1'x
>   end
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:5"
>   cell $memrd $memrd$\ra$exp.v:5$8
>     parameter \TRANSPARENT 0
>     parameter \CLK_POLARITY 0
>     parameter \CLK_ENABLE 0
>     parameter \WIDTH 1
>     parameter \ABITS 32
>     parameter \MEMID "\\ra"
>     connect \DATA $memrd$\ra$exp.v:5$8_DATA
>     connect \ADDR 0
>     connect \EN 1'x
>     connect \CLK 1'x
>   end
> 
>   attribute \src "exp.v:4"
>   process $proc$exp.v:4$3
>     assign { } { }
>     assign { } { }
>     assign { } { }
>     assign { } { }
>     assign { } { }
>     assign { } { }
>     assign { } { }
>     assign $0$mem2bits$\ra$exp.v:5$1[0:0]$4 $memrd$\ra$exp.v:5$8_DATA
>     assign $0$memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_ADDR[31:0]$5 0
>     assign $0$memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_DATA[0:0]$6 $add$exp.v:5$10_Y
>     assign $0$memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_EN[0:0]$7 1'1
>     sync posedge \clk
>       update $mem2bits$\ra$exp.v:5$1 1'x
>       update $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_ADDR $0$memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_ADDR[31:0]$5
>       update $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_DATA $0$memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_DATA[0:0]$6
>       update $memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_EN $0$memwr$\rb$exp.v:5$2_EN[0:0]$7
>   end
> end

> yosys>
